items.title: Caterpillar Taps AI Data Center Power Demand With Monarch Campus Deal
items.description: Caterpillar has entered an alliance to supply 2 GW of natural gas generator sets with battery storage to the Monarch Compute Campus. The project is aimed at meeting rising power needs from AI focused data centers. The order highlights Caterpillar's push into power solutions tailored for large scale digital infrastructure. Caterpillar (NYSE:CAT) is tying its industrial power expertise to the fast growing AI data center build out through this large Monarch Compute Campus order. With the stock...

items.title: Stocks Rise While Commodity Markets Face Fresh Volatility
items.description: The Dow industrials gained 1.1%, boosted by a strong U.S. manufacturing report. Gold ended 1.9% lower, while silver is down 33% over the past two sessions.

items.title: I Correctly Predicted That 2024's Best-Performing Dow Jones Stock Would Beat the S&P 500 Again in 2025. Does 2025's Leading Dow Stock Have Room to Run in 2026?
items.description: With record earnings likely coming this year, investors can't get enough of this century-old industrial giant.

items.title: Palantir, Teradyne, Caterpillar, NXP Semiconductors And Disney: Why These 5 Stocks Are On Investors' Radars Today
items.description: Major U.S. indexes finished Monday higher, led by a 1.05% jump in the Dow Jones Industrial Average to 49,407.66.

items.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Jumps As Trump Touts This Deal; Robinhood Plunges But Palantir Pops (Live Coverage)
items.description: The Dow Jones and other major indexes rose. Palantir and Tesla were moving on the stock market today. A Trump move boosted some stocks.
